curation_notes: Primary location derived from the patch diff which modifies only lib/mysql-binuuid/type.rb. The serialize method is the vulnerable function: it passes user input through strip_dashes (which only removes dash characters) then directly into Data.new without validating the input is a valid UUID hex string. No sibling files exist with the same pattern — the lib directory contains only three files (type.rb, version.rb, and the main require file). Pre-assigned class sql-injection confirmed correct from CWE-89, the advisory description, and the patch which adds UUID hex validation.
